name: Jira
description: Monitor Jira Cloud project access, user roles, and permission schemes for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
2. Create an API token
3. Encode: echo -n your@email.com:YOUR_API_TOKEN | base64
4. Enter the result and your subdomain below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your credentials: run echo -n your@email.com:YOUR_API_TOKEN | base64

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews active Jira users and their access for compliance

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Jira projects have proper type and access configurations
